---
title: "About"
format: html
editor: visual
---

This project was developed by **\[Team Pokemon\]** For [INFO 526 - Data Analysis and Visualization](https://datavizaz.org/) at the University of Arizona, taught by Dr. Greg Chism. The team is comprised of the following team members.

-   Team member 1: Max Henderson, ECE M.S. student. Year 4.
